zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Kytson於1460年10月26日出生在英國藍卡爾瓦頓時，他的父親Thomas Kytson 12th ggf34歲，母親Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm35歲。他於1482年與Margaret Cresset在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年2月23日在英國藍卡爾瓦頓享年87歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾瓦頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Kytson于1460年10月26日出生在英国藍卡爾瓦頓时，他的父亲Thomas Kytson 12th ggf34岁，母亲Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm35岁。他于1482年与Margaret Cresset在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年2月23日在英国藍卡爾瓦頓享年87岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾瓦頓。

nameMeanings.name: Kytson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): patronymic meaning ‘son of Kit’, a pet form of Christopher and Christian .
Irish (Wicklow): Anglicized form of Mac Ceit or Ó Ceit, see Kett .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: English, German, West Indian (mainly Trinidad and Tobago, Antigua and Barbuda, and British Virgin Islands), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the English and German personal name Christopher, from Greek Christophoros ‘Christ-bearing’ (see Christ 1). This was borne by a rather obscure 3rd-century Christian martyr. His name was relatively common among early Christians, who desired to bear Jesus Christ metaphorically with them in their daily lives. Subsequently, the name was explained by a folk etymology according to which the saint carried the infant Christ across a ford and so became the patron saint of travelers. Despite the widespread veneration and depiction of this saint, this was not a very common personal name in medieval England, and may in some instances have a habitational origin, for someone living for example in Saint Christopher parish (Saint Christopher le Stocks, London). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Christoffer and cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Kristóf and Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Krištof (see Kristof ). The usual German form of the name is Christoph .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Kytson was born on 26 October 1460, in Warton, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas Kytson 12th ggf, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm, was 35. He married Margaret Cresset in 1482, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 23 February 1548, in Warton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Warton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Kytson est né le 26 octobre 1460, à Warton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Kytson 12th ggf, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cresset en 1482, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 février 1548, à Warton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Warton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Kytson am 26. Oktober 1460 in Warton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kytson 12th ggf 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm 35. Er hat 1482 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Cresset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1548 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Warton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Warton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Kytson è nato il il 26 ottobre 1460 nel Warton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Kytson 12th ggf, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Cresset nel 1482, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1548, nel Warton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Warton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Kytsonが1460年10月26日にイギリスランカシュアイアワートンで生まれた時，父Thomas Kytson 12th ggfは34歳，母Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggmは35歳であった。1482年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMargaret Cressetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年2月23日にイギリスランカシュアイアワートンで87歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアワートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Kytson(이)가 1460년 10월 26일 영국 랭카실르 워턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kytson 12th ggf(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Margaret Cresset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 2월 23일 영국 랭카실르 워턴에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 워턴에 묻혔다.

pt.26 October 1460–23 February 1548: 26 de outubro de 1460–23 de fevereiro de 1548
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Kytson nasceu em 26 de outubro de 1460, em Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Kytson 12th ggf, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cresset em 1482, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1548, em Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Kytson родился 26 октября 1460 г. в местности вартон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Kytson 12th ggf было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cresset в 1482 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 февраля 1548 г. в местности вартон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности вартон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.26 October 1460–23 February 1548: 26 de octubre de 1460–23 de febrero de 1548
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Kytson nació el 26 de octubre de 1460, en Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Kytson 12th ggf, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stoneham 12th ggm, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margaret Cresset en 1482, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1548, en Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
